supply_chain.dependencies: The company depends on third-party service providers for technology infrastructure, data storage, and operational services. Failures by these providers could adversely impact operations.
supply_chain.risks: Reliance on third-party service providers for critical functions including technology systems, data management, and operational support. Disruptions to these providers could materially impact business operations.

regulatory_risks: SEC regulations on investment management and mutual funds
Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) oversight
Commodity Futures Trading Commission regulations
Department of Labor (DOL) regulations
FCA (Financial Conduct Authority) regulations in the UK
Securities Futures Commission of Hong Kong (SFC) regulations
China Securities Regulatory Commission regulations
Commission de Surveillance du Secteur Financier in Luxembourg
Central Bank of Ireland regulations
Bundesanstalt für Finanzdienstleistungsaufsicht in Germany
European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) regulations
EU Directives and Regulations including UCITS and AIFMD
GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation) in Europe
California Consumer Privacy Act
India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act
China's Personal Information Protection Law
Bermuda Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA)
Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation (SFDR) in EU
ESG disclosure requirements and greenwashing regulations
Anti-money laundering and terrorism financing regulations
EU Digital Operational Resilience Act
Antitrust and competition laws
U.S. Department of Treasury's Outbound Investment Screening Rule
Capital adequacy and liquidity requirements for regulated subsidiaries
Senior Managers and Certification Regime in UK
Manager-in-Charge Regime in Hong Kong

sanction_risks: Economic sanctions may impact business operations and client portfolios
Tensions between U.S. and China may impact AUM levels and investor sentiment
Changes to trade policies, tariffs, and import/export regulations could negatively affect global economic conditions
